titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Martin Schøyen Collection of Medieval Seal Matrices
Schøyen (Martin) Collection of Medieval Meal Matrices
titlestmt.author: Tina Evans

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday February 27, 2026 at 23:25

did.unittitle: Martin Schøyen collection of medieval seal matrices

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Richard A. Linenthal on on the James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn Fund, 2021.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The collection is arranged in three series. Series I. Seal Matrices. Series II. Wax impressions. Series III. Catalog and photographs.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: The collection is from the Schøyen Collection, Oslo and London. Schøyen MS 2223.

otherfindaid.head: Other Finding Aids
otherfindaid.p: Manuscripts in the Schøyen Collection : IV Medieval Seal Matrices in the Schøyen Collection. Cataloged by Richard Linenthal and William Noel. Hermes Publishing Oslo 2004.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Martin Schøyen Collection of Medieval Seal Matrices. James Marshall and Marie-Louise Osborn Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Content Description
scopecontent.p: Seal matrices made from a variety of materials including lead, copper alloy, and silver, with wax seal impressions, black and white photographs, and a catalog containing detailed information about each seal. Seals and wax impressions are arranged by catalog number and not all seals have a corresponding wax impression. Seal numbers 14 and 328 are not present.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Martin Schøyen collection of medieval seal matrices is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropraite curator.

did.unittitle: Seal matrices

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The seal matrices are housed in two boxes, arranged numberically in trays.
Seal matrices numbers 14 and 328 are not present.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains seal matrices, which are fully described in the catalog found in Box 3.

did.unittitle: 1. Bust of a tonsured priest, England
2. Shoulder length bust of a priest, England
3. Full-length profile of a priest, England

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This seal shows the owner officiating at mass.

did.unittitle: 4. Two men, one with a raised sword, England
5. Crowned figure holding a sword, Spain
6. Bust of a tonsured man, England
7. Bust of a tonsured man, England
8. Standing figure of an abbot holding a crosier, England

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Seal of Prior Ottwi of a convent of Augustian Hermits or Friars.

did.unittitle: 9. Two men facing inward on either side of a tree, England
10. Half-length male figure facing right, Eastern Flanders

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Seal of James Monetatu, canon and priest of Oudenaarde, Eastern Flanders.

did.unittitle: 11. Full-length figure of a bishop holding a staff, England

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The seal of the Bishop of Man.

did.unittitle: 12. Two men facing one another, England

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The seal of Anthony Blincow, Chancellor of Chichester and Commissary of the Archdeaconry of Lewes.

did.unittitle: 13. Chancellor of the Court of Pleas of Durham, England

16. Knight on horseback. England or Norway

18. Shoulder-length bust of a man, England

20. Neck-length bust of a man, England
21. Archer drawing his bow, England

33. Bust of a man, profile facing right, England

71. St. Andrew, crucified, with two fleurs-de-lis, England

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The seal of the Dean of Isleham, a parish and village in Cambridgeshire.

scopecontent.p: Royal seal for the Consistory Court of Norwich.

Unidentified seal

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The unidentified seal is not represented in the catalog.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: This series contains wax impressions of the seal matrices arranged in numerical order.
Not all seal matrices are represented by a corresponding wax impression.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 1-7, 9, 15, 17-37

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 1.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 38-66

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 2.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: There are two impressions of seal matrice number 56.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 68-76, 78, 81-100

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 3.

arrangement.p: These wax impressions are house in tray number 4.

arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 5.

arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 6.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 7.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 224-244, 246-254

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 1.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 255-276, 279-286

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 2.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 3.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 4.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 372-396

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 5.

did.unittitle: Wax impressions 8, 10, 67, 352, Oversize

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: These wax impressions are housed in tray number 6.

did.unittitle: Catalog

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This series contains three copies of the Schøyen seals catalog, along with unsorted black and white photographs of the seal matrices, many of which are duplicates.

did.unittitle: Manuscripts in the Schøyen Collection: IV Medieval seal matrices in the Schøyen Collection. Cataloged by Richard Linenthal and William Noel. Hermes Publishing: Oslo. 2004

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains three copies of this catalog.

did.unittitle: Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains unsorted black and white photographs of the seal matrices, some of which are duplicates.

did.unittitle: Photographs

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains unsorted black and white photographs of the wax impressions, some of which are duplicates.
